summary: Tested Super Admin Panel for P2P Exchange. All 18 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI tests verified all admin panel sections working correctly.

issues: React warning: Cannot update a component while rendering a different component (BrowserRouter/Auth) - minor React state management issue, does not affect functionality

passed_tests: Backend: Admin login with correct credentials (admin/000000) - PASSED
Backend: Admin login rejected with wrong password - PASSED
Frontend: Admin login flow works correctly - PASSED
Frontend: Admin panel overview page loads with statistics - PASSED
Frontend: Users page loads with user list and filters - PASSED
Frontend: Finances page loads with P2P/Marketplace data and chart - PASSED
Frontend: Commissions page loads with all commission settings - PASSED
Frontend: Staff page loads with admin user - PASSED
Frontend: Activity logs page loads with admin actions - PASSED
Frontend: Navigation between all admin sections works - PASSED
critical_code_review_comments: Minor React warning in console about setState during render - does not affect functionality but could be cleaned up
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data. Platform has 8 traders, 6 merchants, 1 shop, 25+ completed trades, 1059 USDT turnover, 14.79 USDT commission.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Super Admin Panel fully functional. Admin (login: admin, password: 000000) has owner role with full access. All API endpoints tested: overview, users (with filters), staff, finances (with period filters), maintenance mode toggle, activity logs, moderation chats, commissions. Frontend navigation works for all sections: Обзор, Пользователи, Персонал, Финансы, Объявления, Сделки, Споры, Список мерчантов, Заявки, Магазины, Выводы, Форум, Личные чаты, Комиссии, Система, Логи. User ban/unban and balance adjustment APIs verified working.
